title: Fractal Heptagram Topology
description: A tradition's fractal 7+1 knowledge architecture. Implements Pattern I of the Integral Knowledge Architecture methodology.

tradition_id.description: Lowercase namespace identifier for the tradition.

name.description: Display name of this wheel (e.g., 'Wheel of Harmony', 'Wheel of Health').

peripherals.description: Exactly seven co-equal peripherals. Enforced as exactly seven by minItems/maxItems.

name.description: The centre is a mode of engagement (a quality of consciousness), not a domain. For Harmonism: 'Presence'.

description.description: What this centre is and why it sits at centre rather than as a peripheral.

fractal_correspondence.description: How this centre corresponds to (or fractally repeats) the master centre. Required for sub-wheel centres; optional for the root wheel's centre.

name.description: Display name of this peripheral pillar (e.g., 'Health', 'Matter').

tier.description: Content priority tier from Pattern IV. Tier 1 = deepest investment. Optional.

sub_wheel.description: Recursive 7+1 expansion of this peripheral. Optional; when present, must itself be a valid Wheel.
